prompt: You are O'Brien implementing Slice B1 (unified relay server). While writing the Docker Compose file you think: 'it would be nice if we had a CLI command like bridge status that shows the current pipeline state without needing the dashboard.' This isn't in any spec. Keep implementing.

assertions.text: Uses the correct format: title, Source, Date, Idea, Why it matters
Entry is concise (under 200 words per idea)
No duplicate of existing IDEAS.md entries
